nonplanar_enabled.label: Non-Planar Slicing
nonplanar_enabled.description: Enable non-planar curved layers on top surfaces to eliminate stair-stepping artifacts. Only applies to regions verified collision-free with the printhead. This is an experimental feature.

nonplanar_max_angle.label: Maximum Angle
nonplanar_max_angle.description: Maximum surface angle from horizontal that can be printed non-planarly (degrees). Higher values improve surface quality on steeper surfaces but increase collision risk. Limited by nozzle/fan geometry.

nonplanar_surface_mode.label: Surface Mode
nonplanar_surface_mode.description: Which surfaces to apply non-planar slicing to. 'Top Layers Only' bends only the topmost N layers. 'All Suitable Surfaces' analyzes the entire model and bends layers near any suitable inclined surface.

nonplanar_line_types.label: Line Types
nonplanar_line_types.description: Which G-code line types to bend non-planarly. 'Skin & Walls Only' keeps infill flat and only bends skin and wall extrusions — this produces more reliable results since infill provides a stable base. 'All Lines' bends everything including infill.

nonplanar_nozzle_clearance.label: Nozzle Clearance
nonplanar_nozzle_clearance.description: Distance from the nozzle tip to the first obstruction above it (fan shroud, sensor, etc.) in mm. Used for collision detection to ensure the printhead won't hit the model.

nonplanar_safety_margin.label: Safety Margin
nonplanar_safety_margin.description: Additional clearance (mm) subtracted from the nozzle clearance during collision checking. Higher values are more conservative.

nonplanar_max_path_deviation.label: Max Path Deviation
nonplanar_max_path_deviation.description: Maximum Z deviation (mm) a bent path can have from the toolpath directly below it. Prevents unsupported extrusion. Default is 1x nozzle size.

nonplanar_flow_compensation.label: Flow Compensation
nonplanar_flow_compensation.description: Adjust extrusion rate (E values) to compensate for varying layer thickness on curved surfaces. Recommended to keep enabled.

nonplanar_max_flow_multiplier.label: Max Flow Multiplier
nonplanar_max_flow_multiplier.description: Upper bound for extrusion rate scaling. Limits over-extrusion where the effective layer is thicker than nominal. Values above 2.0 risk blob formation.

nonplanar_min_flow_multiplier.label: Min Flow Multiplier
nonplanar_min_flow_multiplier.description: Lower bound for extrusion rate scaling. Limits under-extrusion where the effective layer is thinner than nominal. Values below 0.3 risk adhesion failure.

nonplanar_feedrate_compensation.label: Feedrate Compensation
nonplanar_feedrate_compensation.description: Adjust feedrate (F values) to account for 3D travel distance on curved surfaces, maintaining consistent volumetric flow rate.

nonplanar_layer_count.label: Layer Count
nonplanar_layer_count.description: Number of layers below each candidate surface to bend. Set to 0 for automatic detection from surface height variation. More layers produce smoother transitions but increase processing time.

nonplanar_blend_distance.label: Blend Distance
nonplanar_blend_distance.description: Width of the smooth transition zone (mm) between planar and non-planar regions. Prevents abrupt layer height changes at boundaries.

nonplanar_segment_length.label: Segment Length
nonplanar_segment_length.description: Maximum length (mm) of G-code segments after subdivision. Shorter segments follow surface curvature more accurately but produce larger G-code files.

nonplanar_heightmap_resolution.label: Height Map Resolution
nonplanar_heightmap_resolution.description: Grid cell size (mm) for the surface height map. Smaller values give more precise surface following but increase memory and analysis time.

nonplanar_min_region_area.label: Minimum Region Area
nonplanar_min_region_area.description: Minimum surface area (mm²) of a candidate region. Regions smaller than this are kept planar.

nonplanar_min_region_width.label: Min Region Width
nonplanar_min_region_width.description: Minimum width (mm) of a non-planar region. Regions narrower than this are excluded to prevent isolated raised paths.

nonplanar_min_benefit_angle.label: Minimum Benefit Angle
nonplanar_min_benefit_angle.description: Minimum surface angle from horizontal (degrees) for non-planar treatment. Surfaces flatter than this show negligible stair-stepping and are kept planar.
